Appearance

Semantic-TypeScriptFlow, Indexed.

Your data, under precise control.

Get Started
API Reference

Type-Safe Stream Processing

Full TypeScript type inference ensures compile-time safety across your entire pipeline.

Smart Backpressure

Push-pull dual channels with automatic flow control prevent memory overflow.

Leak-Proof Event Streams

Automatic resource management with self-cleaning listeners, no manual unsubscribe needed.

Built-in Statistics

Ready-to-use analytics including average, variance, standard deviation, and more.

Unified Sync & Async

Same API for both synchronous and asynchronous streams, lower learning curve.

Lazy Evaluation

On-demand computation with short-circuit optimization for superior performance.
